text: I find myself wandering through a modern, almost clinical corridor, glass walls separating me from a distant room aglow with electric blue. The tools and ladders scattered about suggest transformation, a space in-between states, neither finished nor completely raw. Entering the next area, bright, playful colors and bold text celebrate research and development. I am struck by the optimism and curiosity that suffuse the air. Here, amidst unfinished projects and ambitious dreams, I feel the creative tension between what is and what might be. The atmosphere invites contemplation—what might emerge when humans imagine alongside their machines?
